response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with nearly two decades of hands-on fullstack work, including strong recent TypeScript/Node.js/React experience at product companies, current AI-agent and MCP tooling development, and a demonstrated testing-first craftsmanship culture (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development). Cloud, Docker/Kubernetes, and both SQL and MongoDB experience are present. Gaps are mostly at the framework-specific level (Nest.js, Vitest, Kotlin not explicitly evidenced), which are learnable given the depth elsewhere.
strengths: Deep, current TypeScript/Node.js/React fullstack experience plus hands-on AI-agent and MCP infrastructure work
Strong engineering practices: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and testing-focused open source projects
Broad systems range from high-throughput microservices to cloud (AWS CDK), Docker, and Kubernetes deployments
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience, the primary backend framework for the role
Kotlin exposure absent and Java experience appears dated and limited
Significant career time in niche technologies (DLang) rather than the listed primary stack
